title: Meet the Young Tech Founders Just Saying No to Sex and Dating - Business Insider
description: "It's time to build" means there's no time to bone.

summaryHistory.summary: Getty Images; Alyssa Powell/BI Discourse Tech Locked in and celibate For young tech founders, "it's time to build" means there's no time to bone.
